name: nonprofit finance teams managing 5–15 grants/month tool
description: For nonprofit finance teams processing 5–15 grants/month, inefficient tracking causes late funder reports. We provide streamlined grant management instead of manual spreadsheets and email communication.
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking and reporting of grant spending
